---
title: "CauldRon Master Mix Report"
output: html_document
params:
  proj_id: NA
  proj_num: NA
  protocol: NA
  samples: NA
  all_mixes: !r list()
---

## Project: `r params$proj_id` (#`r params$proj_num`)
**Protocol:** `r params$protocol`  
**Base Sample Count:** `r params$samples`

---

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
# Loop through the list of dataframes and print each one
for (mix_name in names(params$all_mixes)) {
  cat("### ", mix_name, "\n")
  print(knitr::kable(params$all_mixes[[mix_name]]))
  cat("\n\n")
}
